title: lamium tuberiferum
intro: Lamium tuberiferum, also known as Spotted Deadnettle, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Lamium tuberiferum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
